scope.target: Pilot migration for one skill and one delegated sub-agent family
scope.dependency_radius: .ai canonical assets, wrapper roots, human guides, current Claude skill roots
constraints: Do not duplicate full canonical content in Codex/Gemini/Copilot wrappers
non_goals: Do not migrate every existing skill in this stage
Do not generate wrappers automatically yet

inputs.architecture_target: Validate the canonical-to-wrapper model end to end
user_constraints: Support Claude, Codex, Gemini, and GitHub Copilot

steps: Created a canonical skill spec and canonical references for ddd-ca-hex-architect
Created the initial canonical delegated assets for command/query/reactor sub-agent prompts
Created thin wrapper entries for Codex, Gemini, and GitHub Copilot
validation: Pilot assets now have canonical source, human-facing guide, and wrapper entry points
Wrapper files stay thin and point back to canonical source
deferred_items: Update Claude wrappers to consume canonical source more directly
Migrate additional skills and command families

results.summary: Completed the first pilot migration for portable skill and delegated sub-agent wrappers.
